description: Allocate dairy (milk, laban, yogurt, cheese, juice) across stores by velocity × RSL; reroute Iftar-window deliveries; minimize waste via markdown / transfer / donate cascade.
tooltip_text: Focus: Iftar-window routing, fair-share allocation, and waste minimization for perishable dairy.

show.text: Which deliveries today are at risk of missing their Iftar window?

simulate.text: If STORE-EAST velocity doubles for 3 hours, re-allocate YOGURT-FRUIT-4P — what changes?

simulate.text: If ROUTE-DAIRY-03 is delayed 45 min, which stops must be swapped to keep the Iftar window?

simulate.label: Redirect aged yogurt
simulate.text: If I redirect aged YOGURT-FRUIT-4P from CDC-DAIRY-02 to STORE-MALL-01, how much waste drops?
